title: buildah build --layers does not burst with complicated heredoc
body:
For context, I have a large `Containerfile` with many, many multi-line `RUN` invocations that I have grouped together with heredocs.  I want strict error behavior within these heredoc chunks, so to make this easy for myself I have structured them as follows:

```Dockerfile
FROM ubuntu

ARG SHELL="/bin/bash -euo pipefail"
RUN <<-EOF ${SHELL}
	...
EOF
```

However, it appears that due to providing the shell executable as an argument, buildah's cache does not catch changes made to the heredoc.  Example:

```
$ cat Containerfile 
FROM ubuntu

ARG SHELL="/bin/sh"
RUN <<-EOF ${SHELL}
        echo hello
EOF
```
```
$ buildah build --layers
STEP 1/3: FROM ubuntu
STEP 2/3: ARG SHELL="/bin/sh"
--> Using cache b4aed41c8c79611f7f92e21f70c933abcb43cb7f1cdc95934f86cb0d68d818f3
--> b4aed41c8c79
STEP 3/3: RUN <<-EOF ${SHELL} (echo hello)
hello
COMMIT
--> 1058050eb66d
1058050eb66d5643b9e18735aae110bb76e0e3966c9e2dab0e59d73b09cb3f6b
```
```
$ buildah build --layers
STEP 1/3: FROM ubuntu
STEP 2/3: ARG SHELL="/bin/sh"
--> Using cache b4aed41c8c79611f7f92e21f70c933abcb43cb7f1cdc95934f86cb0d68d818f3
--> b4aed41c8c79
STEP 3/3: RUN <<-EOF ${SHELL} (echo hello)
--> Using cache 1058050eb66d5643b9e18735aae110bb76e0e3966c9e2dab0e59d73b09cb3f6b
--> 1058050eb66d
1058050eb66d5643b9e18735aae110bb76e0e3966c9e2dab0e59d73b09cb3f6b
```

So far so good, however if I change the heredoc contents and run again:
```
$ cat Containerfile 
FROM ubuntu

ARG SHELL="/bin/sh"
RUN <<-EOF ${SHELL}
        echo hello world
EOF
```
```
$ buildah build --layers
STEP 1/3: FROM ubuntu
STEP 2/3: ARG SHELL="/bin/sh"
--> Using cache b4aed41c8c79611f7f92e21f70c933abcb43cb7f1cdc95934f86cb0d68d818f3
--> b4aed41c8c79
STEP 3/3: RUN <<-EOF ${SHELL} (echo hello world)
--> Using cache 1058050eb66d5643b9e18735aae110bb76e0e3966c9e2dab0e59d73b09cb3f6b
--> 1058050eb66d
1058050eb66d5643b9e18735aae110bb76e0e3966c9e2dab0e59d73b09cb3f6b
```

This is using a from-source build of the latest stable tag of this writing:
```
$ buildah --version
buildah version 1.39.2 (image-spec 1.1.0, runtime-spec 1.2.0)
```

comments.body: This looks like https://github.com/containers/podman/issues/25469, which was just fixed by #6041 on the development branch.
Confirmed that it is fixed on `main`!  Excellent!
